subject: feat(theme): migrate AIPromptHelper and ExportButtons to DaisyUI tokens
body:
Continues DaisyUI migration for remaining components touched by
parallel agents. Replaces violet/emerald/orange/amber dark: pairs
with DaisyUI primary/success/warning semantic tokens.

Tags: theme, daisyui, components, migration
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: major
